mapper.select:
SELECT examine_type AS "type" FROM hpeapm."spl_business_examine" WHERE is_complete = '0'
AND audit_model_number LIKE '%'||#{auditModelNumber}||'%'
AND id!=#{examinID}
LIMIT 1
SELECT user_id AS "user_id" FROM hpeapm.spl_sp_user
SELECT a."examine_id" examinID, a."ope_type" opeType FROM hpeapm."spl_workitem_his" a WHERE a."work_id" LIKE '%'||#{workId}||'%'
SELECT a."examine_id" examinID, a."ope_type" opeType FROM hpeapm."spl_workitem_his" a WHERE a."examine_id" LIKE '%'||#{examineId}||'%' AND a."ope_user_id" LIKE '%'||#{userId}||'%'
SELECT COUNT(audit_model_number) AS num FROM hpeapm."audit_elements_info" a WHERE a."audit_model_number" LIKE '%'||#{auditModelNumber}||'%'

SELECT a."dock_people" AS dockPeople, a."dock_deputy" AS defExamUserDept, a."dock_dept" AS dockDepartment FROM hpeapm."spl_model_type" a WHERE a."audit_model_number" LIKE '%'||#{auditModelNumber}||'%'
SELECT audit_model_name AS modelName FROM hpeapm.audit_elements_info WHERE 1 = 1 AND audit_model_number LIKE '%'||#{auditModelNumber}||'%'
SELECT audit_model_name AS modelName FROM hpeapm."spl_model_type" WHERE audit_model_number LIKE '%'||#{auditModelNumber}||'%'
SELECT id AS cgId, examine_id AS examineId FROM hpeapm."spl_model_type" WHERE 1 = 1 AND audit_model_number LIKE '%'||#{auditModelNumber}||'%'
SELECT loginId AS userId, loginName AS userName FROM hpmgr.bonc_union_userinfos WHERE deputyAccountNumber LIKE '%'||#{deputyAccountNumber}||'%' LIMIT 1

SELECT b."loginId" AS userId, b."deputyAccountNumber" AS deputyAccountNumber, b."userName" AS userName, b."busiunitcode" AS "busiunitcode" FROM hpeapm."spl_model_type" a LEFT JOIN hpmgr."bonc_union_userinfos" b ON a.def_exam_userDept = b."deputyAccountNumber" WHERE a."audit_model_number" LIKE '%'||#{auditModelNumber}||'%'

SELECT b."loginId" AS userId, b."deputyAccountNumber" AS deputyAccountNumber, b."userName" AS userName, b."busiunitcode" AS "busiunitcode" FROM hpeapm."spl_model_type" a LEFT JOIN hpmgr."bonc_union_userinfos" b ON a."def2_exam_userdepy" = b."deputyAccountNumber" WHERE a."audit_model_number" LIKE '%'||#{auditModelNumber}||'%'
SELECT * FROM hpeapm."spl_model_type" a WHERE a."audit_model_number" LIKE '%'||#{auditModelNumber}||'%'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO hpeapm."spl_model_type" (audit_point_number, audit_point_name, audit_model_number, audit_model_name, dock_people, dock_deputy, dock_dept, write_time, audit_model_type, model_owner, model_owner_depy) VALUES (#{auditPointNumber}, #{auditPointName}, #{auditModelNumber}, #{auditModelName}, #{dockPeople}, #{dockDeputy}, #{deckDept},CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, #{auditModelType},#{modelOwner},#{modelOwnerDepy})

INSERT INTO hpeapm."spl_business_examine"
id, process_instId, activity_instId, workItem_Id, audit_model_number, submit_user, sub_depy, submit_time, submit_remarks, examine_user, exam_depy, examine_dept, examine_time, examine_type, examine_result, examine_message_id, is_complete, examine_category, create_time
#{id}, #{process_instId}, #{activity_instId}, #{workItem_Id}, #{audit_model_number}, #{submit_user}, #{sub_depy}, #{submit_time}, #{submit_remarks}, #{examine_user}, #{exam_depy}, #{examine_dept}, #{examine_time}, #{examine_type}, #{examine_result}, #{examine_message_id}, #{is_complete}, #{examine_category}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
mapper.update: UPDATE hpeapm."spl_business_dy" a SET a."is_del" = '0' WHERE a."pro_id" LIKE '%'||#{dyProId}||'%'
mapper.select: SELECT audit_point_number, audit_point_name, audit_model_number, audit_model_name FROM hpeapm.audit_elements_info WHERE audit_model_number LIKE '%'||#{auditModelNumber}||'%'
SELECT user_name AS "value", user_name AS "label" FROM hpeapm."spl_sp_user" WHERE "default" = '1'
SELECT COALESCE(is_syn, 0) AS isSyn FROM hpeapm."audit_elements_info" WHERE audit_model_number LIKE '%'||#{auditModelNumber}||'%'
SELECT * FROM hpeapm."audit_elements_info" WHERE audit_model_number LIKE '%'||#{auditModelNumber}||'%' LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE hpeapm.audit_elements_info SET is_online = '1' WHERE audit_model_number LIKE '%'||#{auditModelNumber}||'%'
UPDATE hpeapm."spl_model_type" SET examine_id =#{examinID} WHERE audit_model_number LIKE '%'||#{auditModelNumber}||'%'
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM hpeapm."spl_model_type" WHERE audit_model_number LIKE '%'||#{auditModelNumber}||'%'
mapper.update: UPDATE hpeapm."spl_mainten_db" SET is_tx='0' WHERE model_no LIKE '%'||#{auditModelNumber}||'%'
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM hpeapm."spl_mainten_db" WHERE model_no LIKE '%'||#{auditModelNumber}||'%'
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM hpeapm.spl_business_examine WHERE id LIKE '%'||#{examinID}||'%'

SELECT a.deputyAccountNumber AS deputyAccountNumber, b."busiunitcode" AS "busiunitcode", b.provincename AS provincename, b.deptname AS deptname, a.userId AS userId, a."userName" AS userName FROM hpmgr."bonc_union_userinfos" a LEFT JOIN hpmgr."bonc_union_orginfos" b ON a.busiunitcode = b.busiunitcode WHERE 1 = 1 AND userName LIKE '%'||#{dockDepartment}||'%' LIMIT 1
SELECT "id" AS id FROM hpeapm."spl_model_type" where audit_model_number LIKE '%'||#{auditModelNumber}||'%'
SELECT COUNT(*) AS a FROM hpeapm."spl_model_type" WHERE audit_model_number LIKE '%'||#{auditModelNumber}||'%'

SELECT id AS examinID, submit_remarks AS remarks, audit_model_number AS auditModelNumber FROM hpeapm."spl_business_examine" WHERE audit_model_number LIKE '%'||#{auditModelNumber}||'%' AND is_complete = '0'
mapper.update:
UPDATE hpeapm."spl_model_type" SET
def2_exam_user LIKE '%'||#{def2ExamUser}||'%',
def2_exam_userdepy LIKE '%'||#{def2ExamUserDepy}||'%',
def_exam_user LIKE '%'||#{defExamUser}||'%', def_exam_userDept=#{defExamUserDept} WHERE 1=1
and audit_model_number in
#{auditModelNumber}
mapper.select: SELECT type_of_information AS "step", audit_model_type AS type FROM hpeapm."spl_model_type" WHERE audit_model_number LIKE '%'||#{auditModelNumber}||'%'
SELECT audit_model_type AS modelTypeExam FROM hpeapm."spl_model_type" WHERE audit_model_number LIKE '%'||#{auditModelNumber}||'%'
SELECT GROUP_(c.name) data_content_description FROM hpeapm.audit_elements_data_support_v2 c WHERE 1 = 1 AND c.audit_model_number LIKE '%'||#{auditModelNumber}||'%' AND c.isdel = '1'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO hpeapm."xbpj_operation_flow" (business1, business2, source, business_area, "field", AuditpointNo, AuditpointName, ModelNo, ModelName, model_type, bonc_audit_point, source_domain, model_online_time, audit_scope, model_url, model_OnlineJi_Time, model_logic, home_system, data_source, datastart_time, modelrunning_frequency, is_cured, "order", cmwa_export_path, cmca_file_type, cmca_subject_id, source_code, belong_cmwa, version, allow_down) VALUES ( #{business1},#{business2},#{source},#{businessArea},#{field},#{auditPointNo},#{auditPointName},#{modelNo},#{modelName},#{model_type},#{auditCode},#{source_domain}, #{model_online_time},#{audit_scope},#{model_url},#{model_OnlineJi_Time},#{model_logic},#{home_system},#{data_source},#{datastart_time}, #{modelrunning_frequency},#{is_cured},#{order},#{cmwaExportPath}, #{cmcaFileType},#{cmcaSubjectId},#{sourceCode},#{belongCmwa},#{version},#{allowDown} )
mapper.select: SELECT a.deputyAccountNumber AS deputyAccountNumber, b."busiunitcode" AS "busiunitcode", b.provincename AS provincename, b.deptname AS deptname, a.userId AS userId, a."userName" AS userName, c.login_id as loginId FROM hpmgr."bonc_union_userinfos" a LEFT JOIN hpmgr."bonc_union_orginfos" b ON a.busiunitcode = b.busiunitcode LEFT JOIN hpmgr.bonc_user_role_info as c on a.deputyAccountNumber = c.deputy_accountNumber WHERE 1 = 1 AND a.deputyAccountNumber LIKE '%'||#{deputyAccountNumber}||'%' ORDER BY orgLevel DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT COUNT(*) AS num FROM hpeapm."audit_show_qx" a WHERE a."userDepy" LIKE '%'||#{defExamUser}||'%'
mapper.insert:
insert into hpeapm.spl_workitem_his
work_id,
examine_id,
role_name,
dept_name,
ope_type,
ope_user,
ope_user_id,
ope_time,
next_user_id,
next_user,
reoly_type,
reoly_remarks,
#{workId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{examineId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{roleName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{deptName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{opeType,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{opeUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{opeUserId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{opeTime},
#{nextUserId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{nextUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{reolyType,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{reolyRemarks,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
mapper.update:
update hpeapm.spl_workitem_his
reoly_type LIKE '%'||#{reolyType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}||'%',
reoly_remarks LIKE '%'||#{reolyRemarks,jdbcType=VARCHAR}||'%',
where work_id LIKE '%'||#{workId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}||'%'
